text:
Polly just got a massive glow-up and we are OBSESSED 🐝✨

Here’s what’s new in the garden:
🎭 **New Character Energy:** Added Qwen-Character for all your roleplay needs (plus better pricing on Airforce models!)
🛠️ **Cozy Workflow:** We merged the Docs right into the Play page. No more tab switching—just pure creation flow.
🧠 **Big Brain Mode:** Polly is smarter and safer than ever with better reasoning skills and stronger security shields.

Building with heart just got easier. Come play! 🌸

Link in bio 🔗
